slack.title: Slack
slack.description: Search messages, read channels, and post summaries — the delivery surface for checkpoint reminders and owner nudges.

gmail.title: Gmail
gmail.description: Search and read email threads for stakeholder context and follow-ups.

google-drive.title: Google Drive
google-drive.description: Search, read, and fetch business cases, benefits registers, and tracking logs from Google Drive.

google-calendar.title: Google Calendar
google-calendar.description: Read calendar events for go-live dates, baseline cutoffs, and realisation-window milestones.

atlassian.title: Atlassian
atlassian.description: Read Jira issues and Confluence pages for benefits registers, tracking logs, and recovery decisions.
